pageContext.name: Cat Girl
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints and the Frank Frazetta Art Museum present the Cat Girl Fine Art Print.  Legendary artist Frank Frazetta has been responsible for countless iconic paintings that have shaped popular fantasy, horror, and sci-fi imagination. Standing out among other expert works, Cat Girl is considered to be one of the artist's personal favorites. Originally featured on the cover of Creepy #16, this final incarnation of the image depicts a nude woman surrounded by big cats lounging in the mossy overgrowth. This lush jungle scene is deceptively inviting, as the viewer is beckoned into the wild hideaway while claws and ravenous eyes hide in the shadows. Though Frazetta himself refused to part with the original, this high-fidelity giclée print captures all the incredible depth and detail for any fan looking to add this masterpiece to their collection.  Each Cat Girl Fine Art Print in the limited edition of 300 pieces includes a Certificate of Authenticity and features a hand-stamped, authorized signature of artist Frank Frazetta as well as the official Frazetta Art Museum embossed Seal of Authenticity. A portion of the proceeds from sales of Cat Girl will directly benefit the Frazetta Art Museum's preservation and exhibition of the artist's essential works. This stunning artwork is available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, making it a highly collectible addition to any home gallery.  Sink your claws into this beauty and bring home the Cat Girl Fine Art Print by Frank Frazetta today.
